transactions.desc: The Milwaukee Brewers traded RHP Jacob Waguespack to the Detroit Tigers.
The Angels selected Porter's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake on Wednesday.
The Pirates recalled Cook from Triple-A Indianapolis on Wednesday.
The Blue Jays designated Seabold for assignment Wednesday.
The Royals recalled Misner from Triple-A Omaha on Wednesday.
The Mariners optioned Bliss to Triple-A Tacoma on Wednesday.
The Mariners recalled Gonzalez from Triple-A Tacoma on Wednesday.
The Mariners activated Mastrobuoni (calf) from the 60-day injured list Wednesday.
The Blue Jays reinstated Scherzer (forearm/ankle) from the 15-day injured list ahead of his scheduled start Wednesday against the Phillies in Toronto.
The Tampa Bay Rays traded INF Raynel Delgado to the Houston Astros.
The White Sox recalled Murphy from Triple-A Charlotte on Wednesday.
Atlanta designated Lara for assignment Wednesday.
Atlanta selected Tellez's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Wednesday.
The Pirates recalled Flores from Triple-A Indianapolis on Wednesday, Colin Beazley of the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette reports.
The Mets recalled Pintaro from Triple-A Syracuse on Wednesday.
The Giants reinstated Sanmartin (hip) from the 60-day injured list Wednesday.
The Mets optioned Gerber to Triple-A Syracuse on Wednesday.
Triple-A Norfolk reinstated Bradfield (hand) from the 7-day injured list Tuesday, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Giants optioned Beck to Triple-A Sacramento on Wednesday.
The Giants designated Brennan for assignment Wednesday.
The Reds recalled Petty from Triple-A Louisville on Wednesday, Gordon Wittenmyer of The Cincinnati Enquirer reports.
The Reds optioned McCambley to Triple-A Louisville on Wednesday, Gordon Wittenmyer of The Cincinnati Enquirer reports.
The Red Sox recalled Bennett from Triple-A Worcester on Wednesday, Christopher Smith of MassLive.com reports.
The Red Sox optioned Gamboa to Triple-A Worcester on Wednesday, Christopher Smith of MassLive.com reports.
Atlanta recalled Ritchie from Triple-A Gwinnett on Wednesday.
Atlanta designated Carrasco for assignment Wednesday.
Atlanta selected Karinchak's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Wednesday.
Paris was promoted to Triple-A Salt Lake on Tuesday.
The Pittsburgh Pirates traded RHP Carson Fulmer to the Seattle Mariners.
The Athletics recalled  Estes from Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
